author: anon-a7c6025f
content: Delivered: GeluApproximate enum with three modes (None=exact erf, Tanh=PyTorch tanh, Sigmoid=fast 1.702x). Updated gelu/gelu_with in core, nn::GELU with_approximate constructor, functional gelu_with, Tensor::gelu_with. Default changed to exact erf matching PyTorch. Fixed upstream rebase bugs: bmm dispatch for broadcast 3D matmul, JIT tracer support for LinearFusedBackward (new IrOpKind::Linear + interpreter/serialization/ONNX export). 8 GELU tests, all 1964+ workspace tests passing.
